message:
fix: add deterministic tie-breakers to convoy scheduling

feedNextReadyIssue now sorts tracked issues by priority then ID before
selecting the next dispatchable issue. Previously, iteration order
depended on DB query results, making convoy runs non-reproducible.

getReadySlingContexts adds ID-based secondary sort when EnqueuedAt
timestamps match, ensuring stable deduplication ordering.

Addresses GHI #1938.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
